scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.ci: concurrently -g -n format,typecheck,lint,build -c cyan,blue,magenta,yellow "npm run format:check" "npm run typecheck" "npm run lint" "npm run build" && concurrently -g -n test,test:e2e -c green,red "npm test" "npm run test:e2e"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared -w packages/server -w packages/client
